initial_candidates.sql:
WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        LEAST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city1,
        GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city2,
        AVG(
            6371 * 2 * ASIN(
                SQRT(
                    POW(SIN((a2.coordinates[1] - a1.coordinates[1]) * 0.0174532925 / 2), 2) +
                    COS(a1.coordinates[1] * 0.0174532925) * COS(a2.coordinates[1] * 0.0174532925) *
                    POW(SIN((a2.coordinates[0] - a1.coordinates[0]) * 0.0174532925 / 2), 2)
                )
            )
        ) AS avg_distance
    FROM flights f
    JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
    JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
    WHERE a1.city < a2.city
    GROUP BY a1.city, a2.city
),
distance_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        city1, city2,
        CASE 
            WHEN avg_distance < 1000 THEN 0
            WHEN avg_distance < 2000 THEN 1000
            WHEN avg_distance < 3000 THEN 2000
            WHEN avg_distance < 4000 THEN 3000
            WHEN avg_distance < 5000 THEN 4000
            WHEN avg_distance < 6000 THEN 5000
            ELSE 6000
        END AS distance_range
    FROM city_pairs
),
range_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        distance_range,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM distance_ranges
    GROUP BY distance_range
)
SELECT MIN(pair_count)
FROM range_counts;

WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        LEAST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city1,
        GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city2,
        AVG(
            6371 * 2 * ASIN(
                SQRT(
                    POW(SIN((a2.coordinates[1] - a1.coordinates[1]) * 0.0174532925 / 2), 2) +
                    COS(a1.coordinates[1] * 0.0174532925) * 
                    COS(a2.coordinates[1] * 0.0174532925) * 
                    POW(SIN((a2.coordinates[0] - a1.coordinates[0]) * 0.0174532925 / 2), 2)
                )
            )
        ) AS avg_distance
    FROM flights f
    JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
    JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
    WHERE a1.city < a2.city
    GROUP BY a1.city, a2.city
),
distance_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        city1, 
        city2, 
        avg_distance,
        CASE 
            WHEN avg_distance < 1000 THEN '0-999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 2000 THEN '1000-1999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 3000 THEN '2000-2999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 4000 THEN '3000-3999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 5000 THEN '4000-4999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 6000 THEN '5000-5999'
            ELSE '6000+'
        END AS distance_range
    FROM city_pairs
),
range_counts AS (
    SELECT distance_range, COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM distance_ranges
    GROUP BY distance_range
)
SELECT MIN(pair_count)
FROM range_counts;

WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        LEAST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city1,
        GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city2,
        AVG(
            6371 * 2 * ASIN(
                SQRT(
                    POW(
                        SIN(
                            (RADIANS(a2.coordinates[1]) - RADIANS(a1.coordinates[1])) / 2
                        )
                    , 2) +
                    COS(RADIANS(a1.coordinates[1])) * COS(RADIANS(a2.coordinates[1])) *
                    POW(
                        SIN(
                            (RADIANS(a2.coordinates[0]) - RADIANS(a1.coordinates[0])) / 2
                        )
                    , 2)
                )
            )
        ) AS avg_distance
    FROM flights f
    JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
    JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
    WHERE a1.city < a2.city
    GROUP BY a1.city, a2.city
),
distance_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        city1, 
        city2, 
        avg_distance,
        CASE 
            WHEN avg_distance < 1000 THEN '0-999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 2000 THEN '1000-1999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 3000 THEN '2000-2999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 4000 THEN '3000-3999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 5000 THEN '4000-4999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 6000 THEN '5000-5999'
            ELSE '6000+'
        END AS distance_range
    FROM city_pairs
),
range_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        distance_range,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM distance_ranges
    GROUP BY distance_range
)
SELECT pair_count
FROM range_counts
ORDER BY pair_count ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        LEAST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city1,
        GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city2,
        AVG(
            6371 * 2 * ASIN(
                SQRT(
                    POWER(SIN((a2.coordinates[1] - a1.coordinates[1]) * 3.14159265358979 / 360), 2) +
                    COS(a1.coordinates[1] * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * 
                    COS(a2.coordinates[1] * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * 
                    POWER(SIN((a2.coordinates[0] - a1.coordinates[0]) * 3.14159265358979 / 360), 2)
                )
            )
        ) AS avg_distance
    FROM flights f
    JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
    JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
    WHERE a1.city <> a2.city
    GROUP BY a1.city, a2.city
),
distance_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        city1, 
        city2, 
        avg_distance,
        CASE 
            WHEN avg_distance < 1000 THEN '0-999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 2000 THEN '1000-1999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 3000 THEN '2000-2999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 4000 THEN '3000-3999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 5000 THEN '4000-4999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 6000 THEN '5000-5999'
            ELSE '6000+'
        END AS distance_range
    FROM city_pairs
),
range_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        distance_range,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM distance_ranges
    GROUP BY distance_range
)
SELECT MIN(pair_count) 
FROM range_counts;

WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        LEAST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city1,
        GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city2,
        AVG(
            6371 * 2 * ASIN(
                SQRT(
                    POW(SIN((a2.coordinates[1] - a1.coordinates[1]) * 3.14159265358979 / 360), 2) +
                    COS(a1.coordinates[1] * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * 
                    COS(a2.coordinates[1] * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * 
                    POW(SIN((a2.coordinates[0] - a1.coordinates[0]) * 3.14159265358979 / 360), 2)
                )
            )
        ) AS avg_distance
    FROM flights f
    JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
    JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
    WHERE a1.city <> a2.city
    GROUP BY LEAST(a1.city, a2.city), GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city)
),
distance_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        city1,
        city2,
        avg_distance,
        CASE 
            WHEN avg_distance < 1000 THEN '0-999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 2000 THEN '1000-1999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 3000 THEN '2000-2999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 4000 THEN '3000-3999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 5000 THEN '4000-4999'
            WHEN avg_distance < 6000 THEN '5000-5999'
            ELSE '6000+'
        END AS distance_range
    FROM city_pairs
),
range_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        distance_range,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM distance_ranges
    GROUP BY distance_range
)
SELECT MIN(pair_count) 
FROM range_counts;

candidates.sql:
WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        LEAST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city1,
        GREATEST(a1.city, a2.city) AS city2,
        AVG(
            6371 * 2 * ASIN(
                SQRT(
                    POWER(SIN((CAST(SUBSTR(a2.coordinates, INSTR(a2.coordinates, ',') + 1) AS REAL) - CAST(SUBSTR(a1.coordinates, INSTR(a1.coordinates, ',') + 1) AS REAL)) * 0.0174532925 / 2), 2) +
                    COS(CAST(SUBSTR(a1.coordinates, INSTR(a1.coordinates, ',') + 1) AS REAL) * 0.0174532925) * 
                    COS(CAST(SUBSTR(a2.coordinates, INSTR(a2.coordinates, ',') + 1) AS REAL) * 0.0174532925) *
                    POWER(SIN((CAST(SUBSTR(a2.coordinates, 1, INSTR(a2.coordinates, ',') - 1) AS REAL) - CAST(SUBSTR(a1.coordinates, 1, INSTR(a1.coordinates, ',') - 1) AS REAL)) * 0.0174532925 / 2), 2)
                )
            )
        ) AS avg_distance
    FROM flights f
    JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
    JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
    WHERE a1.city < a2.city
    GROUP BY a1.city, a2.city
),
distance_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        city1, city2,
        CASE 
            WHEN avg_distance < 1000 THEN 0
            WHEN avg_distance < 2000 THEN 1000
            WHEN avg_distance < 3000 THEN 2000
            WHEN avg_distance < 4000 THEN 3000
            WHEN avg_distance < 5000 THEN 4000
            WHEN avg_distance < 6000 THEN 5000
            ELSE 6000
        END AS distance_range
    FROM city_pairs
),
range_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        distance_range,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM distance_ranges
    GROUP BY distance_range
)
SELECT MIN(pair_count)
FROM range_counts;

distance_ranges AS (
